title: ExternalResearchSource
description: Schema for an entry in the external research source registry. Each source defines how external research enters the AI-native control plane as evidence — never as direct execution commands. Aligned with docs/ai-native/external-research-sources.md and docs/ai-native/external-research-intake-loop.md.

sourceId.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the source. E.g. ai-papers-weekly.

url.description: Canonical URL of the source. Must not contain credentials.

sourceClass.description: Source class per external-research-intake-loop.md classification. external-doc = structured and maintained. web-scan = requires cross-verification. user-paste = manual review. opaque-external = quarantine until promoted.

defaultTier.description: Default reliability tier. A = authoritative primary source, B = trusted secondary, C = community/heuristic, D = unverified or stale. See evidence-reliability-policy.md.

researchCategory.description: Kebab-case research domain tag. E.g. ai-papers-digest, agent-pattern.

intakeCadence.description: How often this source is checked. E.g. 'Weekly (per digest commit)', 'Daily', 'On-demand'.

allowedUsage.description: How this source may influence the control plane. evidence-only = source is input to the intake loop only, no direct task creation. evidence-with-auto-signal = source may auto-generate opportunity signals (still gated before task creation).

humanGateRequired.description: Whether opportunity signals from this source require human gate approval before promotion to task. All sources default to true.

staleDays.description: Number of days after which evidence from this source is considered stale. Null uses the default (90 days). Fast-moving domains use 30 days.

localClonePath.description: Local filesystem path to a research clone, if applicable. Null if not cloned locally.

lianSurfaces.description: LIAN surfaces this source may produce pattern claims for. Empty means unrestricted.

notes.description: Free-text notes about the source. Must not contain secrets.
